title: bupleurum aureum var. breviinvolucratum
intro: Bupleurum aureum var. breviinvolucratum, also known as Chinese or small-leaf bupleurum, is a variety of the Bupleurum aureum plant, which is a species of flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae). It is a traditional Chinese herbal medicine used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and immune-boosting effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum aureum var. breviinvolucratum include reducing fever, relieving stress and anxiety, and improving liver and kidney function, making it a popular remedy for various health conditions. Bupleurum aureum var. breviinvolucratum is commonly prepared as a decoction, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
